overrideJustification: User-testing validator timed out 4 consecutive times due to daemon inactivity timeout. sd-core is a pure Rust library with no user-facing surface (no CLI, TUI, server, or browser). The user-testing validator adds no signal beyond the automated test suite for library crates -- it spawns subagents that each run cargo test with filters, which is exactly what scrutiny already verified. Evidence: 250 total tests pass (97 dynamics-specific), scrutiny validation passed with 0 blocking issues, cargo clippy clean, cargo fmt clean. All 25 VAL-DYN assertions marked passed based on comprehensive automated test evidence. Override approved by user.

evidence.testSuite: cargo test -p sd-core: 250 passed, 0 failed (97 dynamics-specific)
evidence.scrutiny: dynamics scrutiny validation passed with 0 blocking issues
